news.headline: Strategy (MSTR) Climbs 6.56% on Market Optimism
news.snippet: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) is one of the 10 Stocks With Unexpected Gains. Strategy bounced back by 6.56 percent on Monday to finish at $127.69 apiece, as investors mirrored a broader market optimism following strong US jobs data, while waiting on the sidelines ahead of developments on the Iran war. The company rallied alongside its counterparts, […]

news.snippet: Bitcoin, Ether and other cryptocurrencies dropped on signs that fighting in the Middle East will drag on.

news.headline: Strategy Reports $14.5 Billion Loss As Bitcoin Falls Over 20%

news.headline: Morning Minute: Ceasefire Hopes Rise, Fall Along with Bitcoin
news.snippet: Bitcoin rose and fell alongside ceasefire hopes. Strategy and Tom Lee kept buying size. And Polymarket may be building its own financial system.

news.snippet: Harding Loevner, an asset management company, released its “Global Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. news.headline: A Look At Coinbase (COIN) Valuation After OCC Approval For National Trust Bank Custody Role
news.snippet: OCC approval shifts focus to Coinbase’s role as a regulated custodian The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has granted Coinbase Global (COIN) conditional approval to form a national trust bank, a move that could reshape how institutions access digital asset custody and payment services. This conditional charter would allow Coinbase to operate as a federally regulated custodian, safeguarding client assets and acting on their behalf in payments and transactions, once remaining...

news.snippet: Lam Research's dominance in chip equipment fuels strong growth and rising estimates, but rich valuation and technical setup leave investors weighing timing.

news.headline: Strategy's Capital Strategy Drives BTC Growth: Is Upside Sustainable?
news.snippet: MSTR's aggressive capital strategy fuels Bitcoin growth, but reliance on funding and BTC momentum raises questions about how long this rapid expansion can last.

news.headline: Are Low Margins Hurting Gold.com Despite Its Strong Revenue Base?
news.snippet: Gold.com's revenue engine is strong, but razor-thin dealer spreads, higher SG&A and wholesale mix have pushed net margins down to 0.1% in fiscal H1 2026.
